_meta.name: real_curated_holdout2
_meta.purpose: Second HELD-OUT set (26 fresh real sessions, none in tuning or holdout1). A deliberate FALSE-POSITIVE stress test: almost all non-task, heavy on 'looks like a task' decoys (non-board keys KAN-64/67/142/227/240, dashboard/trace/PR *views*, cross-project). Validates the best prompt's untracked guard on unseen data.
_meta.note: 0 task by construction — task recall is covered by tuning (9) + holdout1 (1). This set isolates: does the model resist forcing tasks? untracked-vs-overhead on trivial ops is a definitional gray zone (kept as untracked = 'work'); both are non-task so the guard is unaffected.
